levelList.name: 胸痛
levelList.desc:
[CantIdentify]
優先指定<color=#61DA61>体力</color>最低的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>(優先<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>)
若本技能指定了<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>為<color=#ffffff>目標</color>，則使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+30%

[BeforeAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Breath]強度低于15級，則消耗<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加5級[Breath]強度，獲得5層[Breath]
- 不会因該效果陷入混乱或陣亡

[EndSkill] 若<color=#7C5738>撃殺</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>，則<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得2層[HoldingBreath](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)。若該<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則触発以下效果：
- 使因<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>陣亡而参戦或解除待命的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>増加2級[Breath]強度并使其獲得2層[Breath]
